headline: Trump 🍊🎰 Touts Economy A++++ 😤 as Plebs 😩💸 Feel Grocery GUT PUNCH 🥊🥚
text:
President TRUMP 🍊🦅 dropping CASINO 🔥🎰 RALLY BOMBS 💣 in PA battleground 🏟️🇺🇸, screaming 'Prices PLUMMETING 🚀📉 TREMENDOUSLY 😍 – MAKING AMERICA AFFORDABLE AGAIN 🤑🏠!' Gas ⛽💨 and eggs 🥚🍳 CHEAP AS CHIPS 🥔 but housing 🏘️💰, childcare 👶💸, healthcare 🏥😷 still SLAYING wallets like Kamala's cackle 😂👻! Dems 🤡🔵 CAPTURING economic salt mines 🧂⛏️ in off-year votes, GOP sweating 😰💦 midterms 2026 like NVDA bubble fears 🫧💥!

White House 🚨 unleashing CAMPAIGN RALLY SERIES 📣🚀 to PUMP economic gospel 📖💪 – Trump calls affordability woes a DEM HOAX 🕵️‍♂️🤥! Rolled back tariffs on DOZENS foods 🥐🍎, axed fuel standards ⛽📉, dropped TRUMP-BRANDED kiddo retirement vaults 🧒💰 – 'A+++++++ economy baby 😤📈!' Politico tea ☕: Donnie grades it STRAIGHT 🔥🔥🔥! Approval JUMPS 3pts to 41% Reuters/Ipsos poll 📊🟢 – pivot SLAPPING harder than Epstein files drop 💣📜!

But REALPPL 😤 scraping by: Alaina Hunt 👩‍🎨 37 OKC designer FIRED 😭🔥 cuz TRUMP TARIFFS 🛡️🇨🇳 hammered steel/alum construction 🏗️💥 – 75 job apps 🚫❌, groceries +$25/wk 🛒📈! 'Gov NOT listening 👂🚫' – Kamala voter 💙😢. Beth Richardson 🏪 KS mom SHOOK 🤯 by $5 Mentos gum 🍬💸 – 'Gonna DIE 😵 now!' Laid off tech sales 📉🌍 offshoring, blames Trump tariffs SHOOTING SELF IN FOOT 🦶🔫!

Data MIXED AF 🌀📊: Consumer confidence TANKED 📉😩 Nov low, inflation STUCK 3% 🛑 (Fed 2% tears 😭), but WAY below Biden's 9.1% INFERNO 🔥📈 – prices +25% 5yrs 😤 despite wage bumps 💰⬆️. Stocks 🚀📈 record highs, GDP 1.9% chug 🐌 (down from 2.8% but beats doomscrollers 🤳😱), jobs HEATING UP 🔥📈 post-slowmo.

Trump LOVES tariffs 😍🛡️ – 'FAV WORD 👑, billions $$$$ revenue BRRRR 💨!' Blames Biden/Fed high rates 😡🏦 (now 3.9% SLASHED ✂️, more Wednesday?). Supporter bros STILL RIDING 🍑🚀: John Mohring 🏗️60 Kenosha MAGA since '16, groceries $100 solo 😩🥩🚫 – prices UP pre-Trump but 'GIVING BENEFIT 🫡!' Brad Smith 🌽🫘 IL farmer ZAPPED by China trade war ❄️🇨🇳 but rebounding 📈 since Oct deal 🤝 + $12BN farmer bailout 💰🚜 – 'America First GOAT 🐐🇺🇸 bigger than soy drama!'

Trump simps 🐔💦 vs wallet warriors 😤💸 – economy ORGY 💦📈 or HOAX HUSTLE 🤡? Donnie's MAGIC WAND 🪄🍆 vs Dem salt 😭🧂 – midterms gonna be WILD 🔥🍿!
